ham.subject: Alert: Recent Transaction on Your Account
ham.body:
Dear Valued Customer,

We have detected a recent transaction on your account (Account No.: 123456789) for the amount of $1,200.00 on 07/04/2026 at 14:32 UTC. If you authorized this transaction, no further action is required.

If you did not authorize this activity, please contact our Fraud Prevention Team immediately at 1-800-555-0199 or reply to this email. We will review the transaction and take necessary steps to secure your account.

Thank you for banking with us.

Sincerely,
Customer Service Team

Best regards,
Acme Bank

spam.subject: Urgent: Microsoft 365 Password Expiration Notice
spam.body:
To: employee@company.com

Microsoft 365 Security Team

Subject: Immediate Action Required – Password Expiration

Your Microsoft 365 account password is scheduled to expire on 08/04/2026. Failure to update your password by 23:59 UTC on that date will result in temporary suspension of access to all corporate services including email, SharePoint, and OneDrive.

Please click the following link to reset your password now: <URL>

If you do not act within the specified window, your account will be locked and you will lose access to critical business data.

For assistance, contact the IT Help Desk at 1-800-555-1234.

Thank you,

Microsoft 365 Security Team
